entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Calculation Views - Graphical vs Directly from Views
entry.content: @nguyen_thanh_hieu  But they are not behind the pay wall, you just need to log in to SAP Learning with your user.

entry.title: How to set a Pricing Condition type to inactive during Sales order creation/Change
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We are trying to set a custom condition type to Inactive/active status in Pricing during Sales order creation / change based on few condition checks in BADI's : PRCG_DOCUMENT_ITEM_REQUIREMENT and PRICING_DOCUMENT_REQUIREMENT.

could you please suggest if its feasible using the Above BADI's or if there is any alternative solution.

Thank you In Advance.

entry.title: Re: ADD CUSTOM FIELDS TO ACCOUNT ASSIGNMENT IN MIGO
entry.content: thank you for the quick response sandra , yes it is accepted by my company , how to do it ? this is exactl my question .. The badis MB_MIGO_BADI does not allow this ?

entry.title: SAP reports for deleting Inactive users
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm keen to know if there is a report in SAP which we can schedule to delete inactive users ( User who have never logged in) in SAP? If there is a way to achieve this through SAP GRC?

Thanks in advance!

Regards,

Nandita

entry.title: Where can I start learning how to use SAP Returnable Packaging Management?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Managing Basic Business Scenarios in SAP Returnable Packaging Management learning journey.

Overview
Get ready for an enlightening journey into SAP Returnable Packaging Management, SAP's industry cloud solution. Learn to manage returnable packaging processes across the supply chain, collaborate effectively with suppliers and customers, and gain hands-on experience with SAP's tools. Enhance your skills in defining key terms, understanding ownership scenarios, and configuring master data efficiently.

Learning objectives

  • Describe and execute the process of managing returnable packaging materials with suppliers and customers.
  • ​Understand the required master data and configuration within SAP Returnable Packaging Management​.

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: What BADIs are available for Service Contracts?
entry.content:
There is a requirement to know what BADIs are available for Service Contracts


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: What BADIs are available for Service Contracts?
entry.content: Please refer to the SAP Help documentation Extensibility for Service

entry.title: Is there an OData API available for performing BIN Sorting via API?
entry.content:
We are unable to identify an API that would allow us to perform BIN sorting. We need this functionality as part of managing the data lifecycle for S4HPC in a side-by-side application in the BTP ABAP environment.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is there an OData API available for performing BIN So...
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

Currently, there is no specific API available for performing BIN sorting in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud as part of managing data lifecycle for a side-by-side application in the Business Technology Platform (BTP) ABAP environment. However, as an alternative, you can consider creating custom logic in your ABAP code to perform the BIN sorting operation.

Please check the documents below for further information:

Storage Bin Sorting

Operations for Warehouse Storage Bin API   (Only available to Retrieve the Warehouse Storage Bin)

Storage Bin

 

Best regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Not able to make the New column to show in front scre...
entry.content: Hi , Thanks for the reply, Please let me know where to check that ? Do you mean metadata cds view ?

entry.title: Improved Integration with Cloud Transport Management
entry.content:
As a customer you may need to work with more than one type of SAP BTP applications, like Integration Suite, SAP Mobile services or SAP Build apps. In such a scenario, you might have a requirement to use either a different SAP Cloud Transport Management service dedicated to a landscape for a particular SAP BTP application or choose a different transport route as you create different transport requests.

Content Agent is a tool that acts as a local agent and operates at sub account level for managing content operations for different SAP BTP services. This service acts as a technical enabler to integrate with Cloud Transport Management by providing option to transport the enterprise ready changes across SAP BTP accounts following standardised change management policies.

With the recent improvements in SAP Content Agent, it is possible to have more flexibility in integrating with Cloud Transport Management. Additionally when the transport request is created, you can also monitor the status and logs at the target node level.

Subscription to Content Agent service

To use SAP Content Agent you will need a subscription to "free" plan (saas application) which is free and auto entitled in every SAP BTP account. Along with that you will need some roles assigned to your user for which you can use pre-defined role collections. For more information, See Subscribe the UI plan and Assign User Roles and Permissions.
To enable the supported SAP BTP applications, where destination configuration is required, please refer to Supported Transport Scenarios and Supported Content Types.

Subscription to Cloud Transport Management

As a prerequisite you must have a subscription to Cloud Transport Management service and landscape configuration by creating target nodes and routes.
For more details see Subscribing to Cloud Transport Management and Configuring the Landscape.
To export content to the transport queue of Cloud Transport Management you need a destination in the source (development) SAP BTP account, see Create TransportManagementService Destination

Integration options

While launching the SAP Content Agent service, the overview page is loaded. Click on the "Cloud Transport Management" tile to see the different options and connectivity status. 

  • Destination - Select a destination from the list of available destinations targeted to Cloud Transport Management. The list will provide the destinations created in the BTP account having the prefix "TransportManagementService". By default, the destination is selected as TransportManagementService.
    For more information, see Create TransportManagementService Destination

  • Connection Status - Displays the integration status between Content Agent and Cloud Transport Management

  • Error Status - Displays the connection error details and possible workaround to restore connection between Content Agent and Cloud Transport Management.

  • Source Node - Select the source node of the transport route. You can select source node depending on the specific applications to separate transport requests based on content types.

    Note: If Source Node is not selected, the sourceSystemId property configured in the destination is used as default.

  • Go to SAP Cloud Transport Management - Launches SAP Cloud Transport Management Home screen.

View Transport Request status and logs

Once you have created the transport request using the export wizard, you can view the information of past activities performed using Content Agent UI.

entry.title: Re: Troubles connecting to HANA Cloud from BAS
entry.content:
The error message you attached shows an authentication error and the correlation-id.

You (or your DB admin) should check a detailed reason when querying your database with

select * from AUTHENTICATION_ERROR_DETAILS

like:

entry.title: Where can I learn the basic configuration settings for delivery documents in SAP S/4HANA?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Configuring Delivery Processing in SAP S/4HANA Sales learning journey.

Overview
In this learning journey, you can learn the basic configuration settings for delivery documents in SAP S/4HANA. Both inbound and outbound processes are discussed, as well as the integration with SAP EWM.

Learning objectives
This learning journey will prepare you to:

  • Work with delivery documents
  • Maintain organizational units for delivery processing
  • Control deliveries (such as the delivery type and delivery item category determination)
  • Post a goods issue for a delivery
  • Integrate delivery processing with EWM

 

Prerequisites

  • Applying SAP S/4HANA Sales 
    or 
  • Applying Supply Chain Execution in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports SDK Intergated Security not working with Oracle

entry.title: Re: Using ODBC 18 driver Crystal Reports runtime (SP34) cuts down memo fields to 255 chars.
entry.content:
You can get the Latest SP 36 from here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

See if that works for you.

Is it possible to create custom reports in embedded SAC in sales cloud v2?

Thanks

Shridhar

entry.title: Re: adobe forms print decimal field in case of initial as empty string

entry.title: SAP Hana express starting problem
entry.content:
I'm trying to start the saplabs/hanaexpress:latest container on macOS(M3 processor and Sequoia 15.1.1). The container is stuck at the message: Waiting for HANA to finish start up ... .

 

I have read the description of the image https://hub.docker.com/r/saplabs/hanaexpress but two things to mention.

Firstly the provided description is for linux OS and secondly there are configs like step: Edit the host sysctl.conf file where such directory does not exist on mac. DBeaver can connect to it but is this message okey or how can i do it to work properly. Because the next step is to be used with TestContainers library.


This is the command which I have used to start it.

sudo docker run -d -p 39013:39013 -p 39017:39017 -p 39041-39045:39041-39045 -p 1128-1129:1128-1129 -p 59013-59014:59013-59014 -v /Users/{IUSER}/Downloads/hana_express:/hana/mounts \

--ulimit nofile=1048576:1048576 \

--sysctl kernel.shmmax=1073741824 \

--sysctl net.ipv4.ip_local_port_range='40000 60999' \

--sysctl kernel.shmall=8388608 \

--name hana \

saplabs/hanaexpress:latest \

--passwords-url file:///hana/mounts/pass.json \

--agree-to-sap-license

entry.title: Re: ADD CUSTOM FIELDS TO ACCOUNT ASSIGNMENT IN MIGO
entry.content: How to do a modification of standard? Do the modification of the standard dynpro directly.

entry.title: What you think about code plagiarism?
Re: Crystal Reports: nvarchar(max) fields truncating after 255 characters in runtime
entry.content:
What version of the SDK is the app using? Did you save the Report after updating and Verifying the Database in CR Designer?

CR saves the DB client used in the RPT file so the SDK will use it.

If the report is not updated, saved, and it can't find the old Client CR will default to a generic database client SQL which may not be capable of using that field type.

entry.content:

I am facing problem while creating STO, in pricing, it says: Condition Record Ignored (Requirement not fulfilled), though the condition record is properly maintained using MEK1. The problem is persistent only for a specific material, while for other materials the pricing is correctly assigned in conditions.

 

Please help

 

Thanks for your urgent help

entry.title: Re: Not able to make the New column to show in front scre...
entry.content: no, do you know how the front end /ui is built for that app?

entry.title: Is it a good decision for someone without an IT background to learn SAP Security GRC?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have 5.3 years of experience working in an MNC in a non-IT role (BPO), and I am now looking to shift my career towards IT, specifically in SAP Security GRC, for better growth opportunities. I am not interested in programming languages, and have found limited opportunities in my current field.

I would greatly appreciate insights from individuals who have transitioned into SAP Security GRC from non-IT backgrounds or from those currently working in this domain. Is it a good decision to pursue SAP Security GRC for long-term career growth?

Additionally, I would like to know:

1. What is the average salary package for someone with 3 to 3.5 years of experience in SAP Security GRC?
    Are there any current job openings for candidates with this level of experience? What is the demand for            SAP Security GRC professionals in the market?
2. Are there opportunities for freshers in this field?
3. Could you recommend any reputable training institutes in Hyderabad for SAP Security GRC with contacts?
4. Is certification required after completing the course, and if so, what is the cost?
5. Is any programming knowledge (like Java, Python, etc.) required to learn SAP Security GRC? Is it a "no            coding" field?
6. Is certification necessary to get job calls and Interviews? If so, what is the certification fee?

Looking forward to your valuable feedback.

Regards,
Sridhar.

Have not seen this before. It could possibly be due to some customization. Try once with different data and different sequence of operations. Also, deactivating customizations and trying once could help to analyze further.

entry.title: Is it a good idea to learn SAP Security GRC without an IT background? Any suggestions?
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I have 5.3 years of experience working in a non-IT role (BPO) at an MNC, and I am now looking to transition into IT for better career growth, specifically in SAP Security GRC. Unfortunately, I have not found many opportunities in my current field, and I am not interested in programming languages.

I would appreciate advice from those who have moved from non-IT to SAP Security GRC or are currently working in this field. Is learning SAP Security GRC a good decision for long-term career growth?

Additionally, I have the following questions:

1. Is any programming knowledge (like Java, Python, etc.) required to learn SAP Security GRC? Is it a "no            coding" field?
2. What is the average salary for someone with 3 to 3.5 years of experience in SAP Security GRC? Are there        openings for candidates with this experience, and what is the current demand?
3. Are there opportunities available for freshers in SAP Security GRC?
4. Could you recommend any good training institutes in Hyderabad for SAP Security GRC?
5. Is certification necessary to get job interviews and calls? If so, what is the certification fee?

Thank you for your time and insights!

Best regards,
KSR.

entry.title: Re: PM Order operation list
entry.content:
Greetings,

there isn't any standard way to transform notification tasks to work order operations. You would need to develop your custom logic. There is s standard scenario where a notification also holds information regarding the task list (group and group counter) but this information is static since it is derived from existing master data.

Perhaps one way would be to maintain a general task list with all possible operations - you could call this a super task list (nomenclature from variant configuration ^^). In next step you would need to maintain a mapping table which would include tasks from catalogue type 2 mapped to operations from this super task list.  

When you create an order from a notification you then take the tasks from notification and operations from the super task list  to determine the operations on the maintenance work order.

Best regards, M.

entry.title: How to Edit Multiple Components Simultaneously in SAP Build Apps’ Logic Canvas?
entry.content:
Does anyone know if it’s possible to edit the properties of multiple components at once in the SAP Build Apps logic canvas? For instance, the "Hide component" and "Show component" flow functions are great for handling a single component individually, but it would be extremely helpful if we could adjust the visibility of multiple elements simultaneously.

I tried creating a new flow function from an existing component and even managed to get it to accept two component IDs. However, I couldn’t create more than one input property, which limited the functionality and prevented simultaneous actions on more than one component.

Has anyone faced this situation before, or does anyone have a workaround or alternative solution to overcome this limitation?
@Dan_Wroblewski, could you help me with this issue?

Regards,

Swaroop

entry.title: Exchanging SAP IBP data using the native Snowflake adapter in SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content:
In the previous Blogs, I explained the steps needed for exchanging data between SAP IBP and Snowflake. We used the Open connectors platform for creating an instance of the Snowflake and AWS S3 connectors. In this blog, I explain how we can exchange data with Snowflake using the native connectors from SAP Cloud Integration directly. You can find more details of this new adapter in these pages :- SAP Business Accelerator Hub - Snowflake Adapter

Fig.1 High level overview of components.
Prerequisites

Install the new Snowflake adapter in your SAP Cloud Integration tenant. For this,

  1. go to Discover workspace in the SAP Cloud Integration.
  2. In the Search box look for Snowflake adapter for SAP Integration Suite package. Select and copy that package into your Design Workspace.
  3. In your Design workspace, select the Snowflake adapter. On the Actions tab of the selection, click Deploy.

This would deploy the adapter in your tenant, and you would be able to use it in your iFlows later.  You can monitor the deployment in the Monitor – Integration and APIs – Overview page under Manager Integration Content.

The Snowflake adapter is designed to work as a receiver adapter. An Iflow in SAP Cloud Integration would initiate a call to the adapter. The adapter uses JDBC as a transport protocol and uses the database credentials from Snowflake. The adapter also uses 3 different external staging options – Amazon S3, Google Cloud Storage and Microsoft Azure. In my previous blog, I explained how we use Amazon S3 as a staging area. We use the same option in this approach.

We also have an Amazon Web Services adapter available natively in SAP Cloud Integration. This adapter supports operations with S3 Buckets. To use this you have to deploy the adapter in your tenant, like you did with the Snowflake adapter.  

  1. go to Software Center - SAP for Me. -> SUPPORT PACKAGES & PATCHES -> By Alphabetical Index (A-Z) -> C -> SAP CP IS ADAPTER ADVANCE PACK & SAP CP IS ADAPTER BASE PACK: SAP CPIS AWS ADAPTER.
  2. If you are using an SAP Cloud Integration version which has a Camel 3x version, use the ZIP file which has Camel 3x as suffix.
  3. Download and unzip the file to a folder you can remember. In the Integration Suite -> Design -> create a new Package for example – AWS Adapter Package. Switch to edit mode and the under the Artifacts tab clock on Add.
  4. In the new pop-up screen, select Add Integration Adapter and select the .ESA file from the adapter folder of your unzip from the previous step.
  5. On the Actions tab, click Deploy.

This would deploy the adapter in your tenant. This adapter helps you to work with many Amazon web services, S3 being one among them. We reuse the Object Store credentials from our previous blog in this one too.

  • This means, you would have created two aliases based on the Object store credentials, one for the AWS Key ID and the other for the AWS Secret Key. For details on how to create these credentials – take a look at this help page. If you are doing it for the first time,
    1. Open the Security Material app from the Monitor -> Integrations and APIs menu item. Create a new Secure Parameter with the name:- AWS_S3_Access_Key_Allias. You can also create a name on your wish.
    2. In the Secure parameter input box, paste the access_key_id from the credentials JSON you get while configuring the Keys for Object store for your AWS S3 bucket.
    3. Do the same for storing the corresponding secret access key also as a secure parameter.

Usage in iFlows

When you write data to Snowflake with data from SAP IBP, you can perform the needed transformation to create a JSON file that can be stored in the AWS S3 staging bucket. The below snippet can help you with a format.

 

try{
        JSONArray results_array = new JSONArray();  
        def count = 1;
        JSONArray valueJSONArray = input.get("IBPReadKeyFigures").get("item");
        if(valueJSONArray.length() > 0) {
            
            def ibp_data = valueJSONArray.collect{[
                "PRODUCT" : it.PRDID,
                "CUSTOMER" : it.CUSTID,
                "LOCATION" : it.LOCID,
                "UNITS" : it.UOMID,
                "COMMENTS" : "From IBP - Count",
                "CONSDEMAND" : it.ACTUALSQTY as BigDecimal,
                "KEYFIGUREDATE" : it.TSTFR
                ]
            }
            
            def builder = new JsonBuilder();
            def result_array_data = []
            
            Integer counterValue = message.getProperty('OverallLogCounter') as Integer ?:0;
            counterValue = counterValue + 1;
            
            def root = builder ibp_data        	
            def prettyBody = builder.toPrettyString();
    	    long len = prettyBody.getBytes().length; 
            String payloadSize = len.toString(); 
        	
            // CLEAR and SET HTTP HEaders 
            message.setHeader("Content-Length", payloadSize);         	
            message.setBody(prettyBody);        	
        }  
        
    } catch (JSONException e) { 
	message.setBody(e);
    }

 

In the above code – valueJSONArray would have the data from SAP IBP in JSON format. We just format this to a JSON array with column names as defined in the Snowflake database schema. JsonBuilder can be used to convert the JSON array to a string that can be sent to the AWS S3 Bucket.

Staging bucket configuration

Create a new local process which can be used to stage the data in an AWS S3 bucket.

  1. Create a Request-Reply combination. In the Adapter type select – AmazonWebServices, which you have deployed. Select the Message Protocol as S3.
  2. In the Connections tab of the adapter – enter a name for the Bucket, Access Key Alias and the Secret Key Alias (for the last two, use the name you had given for storing the Key and Secret as secure parameters in the previous section (Step 6).

Fig.2 Amazon S3 connection configuration.

In the Processing tab, select the S3 Operation as Write. You can also mention a directory name as well as a file name. These details can be provided as configuration parameters too. You can also provide the content type as application/json. Additional options for file handling are also available, it can be used as required.

Fig.3 Amazon S3 bucket processing configuration.

Upsert to Snowflake

Create a new local process to copy data from the staging bucket to the actual database in Snowflake. For this,

  1. Create a Request-Reply combination. Select the adapter as Snowflake. Make sure the message protocol is JDBC.
  2. In the Connections tab of the adapter, enter the JDBC user credentials name. This can be created as user credentials in the Manage Security Material section.
  3. In the Address section, enter the URI of your database. Usually it is jdbc❄️//{your-tenant-name}.snowflakecomputing.com.
  4. Enter the values for the Database, Schema and Warehouse fields. You can make all of these as configuration parameters.
  5. In the Processing tab, select the operation as “Bulk Upsert”. Also provide a valid table name from Snowflake.
  6. Select the Staging Location as “Amazon S3”, Access type as “External Stage” and also give the name of your stage definitions in Snowflake.
  7. In the Optional parameters – you can provide the following:- match_by_column_name='CASE_INSENSITIVE' file_format =  (TYPE = 'JSON'  STRIP_OUTER_ARRAY = TRUE). This is to make sure that the column names are case considered in any format type. We have to strip off the outer JSON key to insert this data.

The configured adapter would look something like this,

Fig.4 Snowflake adapter configuration.

Once these local sub processes are completed, you can call them from a main flow like the below screenshot. A step-by-step guide was presented in the TechEd 2024 virtual event. You can find the exercises as well as the sample iFlow in this Github repo. 

Fig.5 High level overview of iFlow components.

Conclusion

In this method, we explained how the native adapters for Snowflake and Amazon Web Services can be deployed, configured and used for exchanging data with SAP IBP. We did observe there is a slight improvement in the performance with this approach compared to the previous one using Open Connectors Platform. This is because a roundtrip to the OCP is avoided by the native adapters.

entry.title: SAP EPPM public cloud
entry.content: 1- SAP EPPM public cloud Field requirement and the Notification possibilities

entry.title: Re: sapui5 vscode problem when preview - component not found
entry.content: @ future readers; please see the same question asked at https://stackoverflow.com/q/79247043/5846045.

entry.title: Re: Can someone explain me the Parameter EFB
entry.content:
Hello @miguelfdzs 

First, you need to customize authorizations for buyers in the configuration path Materials Management -> Purchasing -> Authorization Management -> Define Function Authorizations for Buyers -> Function Authorizations: Purchase Order:

The settings of an authorization are quite self-evident. There is also F1 help for each field.

Each authorization is given a 2 chars code. This code is then assigned to a user in the SU01 transaction (tab "Parameters") with the parameter id EFB.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: SOAP Sales order API - data type enhancetype

Hi @aravind_indu ,

Have you managed to make it work maybe with the regexp?
Meaning that my answer is a solution? 

Best,
Peter

entry.title: On-Premise AI Excellence: How SAP HANA EE and Skybuffer AI Deliver
entry.content:
All right, AI stories are nice and interesting; however, as SAP posted this week, “Today’s geopolitical environment is defined by uncertainty.” This is moving us toward the necessity of controlling innovative AI solutions in disconnected-from-Internet cases.

Can an Enterprise-Level AI Solution Run In Your Datacenter?
Of course, no problem at all! Let’s think a bit—there is an awesome SAP HANA Enterprise Edition available that has an embedded applications layer, and, in fact, this is a Cloud Foundry solution with all necessary enterprise security mechanisms, all delivered by SAP.

Fig. 1 Skybuffer AI Solution Architecture 

Great! So, we have the following on-premise ingredients:

  • SAP Cloud Foundry Cockpit
  • SAP HANA Database
  • SAP Applications Runtime
  • SAP Job Scheduling

These ingredients allow us to develop SAP Fiori applications using XSA technology directly on the SAP HANA EE application layer.

What is missing?
In a general sense, a few things are missing in SAP HANA EE on-premise to act as your enterprise AI on-premise platform:

  • SAP HANA Vector Engine for document information processing (RAG scenarios)
  • SAP AI Core
  • Action Server (no-code SAP Fiori applications allowing AI modeling)

Is the on-premise gap closed?
Yes! Starting in September 2024, our Skybuffer AI partner solution, developed on SAP technologies, successfully passed the pilot stage and is now available in the SAP Store in both versions:

  • SAP BTP Deployment
  • SAP HANA EE (on-premise) Deployment

We have brought the following missing parts to SAP HANA EE on-premise:

  • SAP HANA Partner Vector Engine
  • AI Core (de facto your preferred on-premise LLM model, for example, Llama 3.1 8B, running inside the SAP Applications Layer in Docker)
  • A set of SAP Fiori applications for no-code AI modeling

 Fig. 2 Skybuffer AI Modeling Dashboard

As a result, you get a ready-to-use platform that integrates Generative AI, RAG, and Conversational AI, allowing businesses to automate tasks quickly and efficiently. It saves costs, reduces development complexity, and accelerates time to value. Everything is on-premise on SAP HANA EE (which you can host even under the table 🙂 ).

Cherry on the cake!
Skybuffer AI is out-of-the-box connected to SAP ECC and SAP S4HANA on-premise systems. We have already developed approximately 400 different integrated business scenarios that allow you to use secure AI assistants connected to your SAP ECC and SAP S4HANA via single sign-on. Yes, another magic—no need to adjust roles and profiles for your users; they get in chat exactly the same information they are authorized to see in the SAP system.

Fig. 3 SAP ECC or SAP S4HANA in Microsoft Teams Channel

What channels are covered?
Communication can be done through many channels, the most popular are:

  • Microsoft Teams
  • Web Chat component (can be embedded in any web page)
  • Zoom
  • SAP Fiori Web Chat

Everything is just a configuration on the Skybuffer AI platform (on your premises)—no need for Python, Node.js, or any other type of development.

What about AI Agents?
Sure, those nice 24/7 employees are also here! Any AI model from Skybuffer AI can be scheduled to execute monitoring, document processing, or any other task. Each time an AI Agent runs, you see the execution results in the conversation log because the AI Agent uses generative AI to explain what has been done and tag the log.

 Fig. 4 AI Agent Generative Log

You can chat with the AI Agent anytime to check the heartbeat of the process. Is it not magic?

Fig. 5 AI Agents Status Check

What about RAG document processing?
Here, we not only supply an RAG solution that is ready to consume without any single line of code. Skybuffer AI also has an RAG Document Viewer that allows your employees to see the documents currently accessible by RAG, check document content, and upload new documents directly from the desktop.

 Fig. 6 Skybuffer AI - RAG Document Management

All documents have metadata parameters, so you can classify documents using 48 out-of-the-box string, numbering, and date-type parameters. What you need to do is define your aliases for parameters, so the RAG Fiori application will speak your company’s terms.

What about Joule?
Let’s wait for Q1 2025. Once SAP makes Joule Build available for SAP Partners, we will connect the Skybuffer AI platform to be available via the Joule communication channel as well. In other words, we complement Joule by bringing Skybuffer AI skills directly into Joule’s embedded AI skills.

Interesting and exciting? Agree!

What do you need to run enterprise-level AI on-premise?
Only SAP HANA, which you most probably already have!

Fig. 7 Skybuffer AI - Action Server for no-code AI Modeling

Performance?
Hmmm, that is something really cool. Old, nice on-premise performance, finally 🙂

entry.title: Re: preventive maintenance plan hierarchical strategies
entry.content:
Greetings,

it would appear so yes. I have prepared an example of two maintenance plans for with the same maintenance strategy.

Strategy contains two packages: 

I have prepared three different tasks lists:

  • FIRST: Contains two operations - one for 1Y package and other for 5Y package
  • SECOND: Contains one operation for 1Y package
  • THIRD: Contains one operation for 5Y package

Operations were properly assigned to packages - below example for FIRST task list example.

I prepared a maintenance plan for first scenario - one maintenance item with a task list containing two operations. Scheduling result is visible below.

I prepared a maintenance plan for second scenario - two maintenance items. Each with a different task list. First with one operation assigned to 1Y package and second with one operation assigned to 5Y package.

Scheduling result is visible below.

Best regards, M.

entry.title: Re: How to update a RAP object within another RAP-object?
entry.content: when the calling side is done, the commit is issued by the framework, the called bo should be saved aslo. how you test your scenario?

entry.title: Upgrade SAP S/4HANA from 2021 to 2023 FPS02: Wrong Fiori Version
entry.content:
Good Morning,

I have recently upgraded a S/4HANA system from 2021 to 2023 FPS02.

After the Upgrade, I noticed the following:
SAP FIORI FES FOR S/4HANA 2023 SP01 was chosen in the stack by the MP, instead of SP02
I had to update UIBAS001 758 from SP01 to SP02 by using K-75802INUIBAS001.SAR.

What is all the more surprising is that Note 3340880 describes that FIORI FES FOR S/4HANA is comprised of SAP_UI 758 and UI for Basis Applications 758.

SAP recommends that SPS should be implement to warranty Stack integrity.
But, the Maintenance Planner has taken SP2 for SAP_UI and SP1 for INUIBAS.

Would you know why the maintenance planner has chosen SP01 instead of SP02 for UI for the target Basis Applications 758?

Regards,

entry.title: Re: SAC Planning - Unable to add Value to a Parent Node
entry.content: Thank you @thomasboub. Selecting "Reason for unplannable data" showed that the account type of leaf nodes and the parent node are not the same. Infact, an account type was not given for the parent node in the master data table. Thank you, the issue is resolved now.

entry.title: Re: The use of Class CL_APS_BC_SCOPE_CHANGE_API is not permitted.
entry.content: I am facing same issue.

entry.title: Re: Eclipse - Where-Used functionality for ABAP CDS views...
entry.content:
Hi,

Have you tried to follow the instructions in SAP Note 28022 to create the index for the where-used list of SAP objects? This might solve the issue.

Kind regards,
Armin

entry.title: The Art and Science of CAP (part 5) with Daniel Hutzel
entry.content:
Daniel Hutzel continues on his exploration of The Art and Science of CAP, sharing insights and ideas from the origins, philosophy and magic of the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model. #SAPCAP #TASC

See the blog post The Art and Science of CAP for all details, notes, previous episodes, links and more.

entry.title: Variable size item as a by-product, negative qty in BOM
entry.content:
We produce steel components from steel plates project wise. For that reason we want to create WBS BOM for the project. The input for that WBS BOM is a tool that calculates how many whole plates we have to put in and it also calculates how much of the whole plate we get back as a reusable rectangle (as a by-product). In the BOM we would like to put in whole plates as pieces (stock item L)  and what we get back as the same material with a usable part of the plate remaining as a variable size item with a negative quantity (by-product), but this variable size item doesn't allow negative quantities. Also in customizing trying to set item category R for variable size item  to both negative and positive quantity, but then SAP issues an error 29617 that a VSItm should always be positive

Is there a way to change the error 29617 to a warning either via customizing or via a BADI / user-exit?

Or is there any other suggestion how to solve this?

entry.title: Re: Not able to make the New column to show in front scre...
entry.content: seems you have no idea what I am asking. do you know a fiori project has frontend part and backend part?

entry.title: Re: Introducing UI5 linter
entry.content: Great tool!!!  Just wondering if this will be incorporated within ALM, so to prevent moving objects along if the linter has findings

entry.title: Re: Not able to make the New column to show in front scre...
entry.content: Yes i very well know what you are asking. Thats what answered this fiori app is backend is CDS view , all the designing is done using CDS annotations. There is no UI5 code involed in this for designing the app. My doubt was it would be been created using "Custom analytical queries" but its not the case i am not able to find that view "Z_JOURNAL_Q010" in the "Custom Analytical Queries" app. So i am not sure what is the issue why we are not able to realign the columns when using the position annotation in CDS view.

entry.title: Re: Not able to make the New column to show in front scre...
entry.content: are you sure? how you run the app?

entry.title: Re: App Manage Bank Accounts (F1366A) – Error in create p...
entry.content: Hi, Amy_Niu! First of all thanks for your reply regarding the topic, however we tried to follow the steps mentioned by you and the CBC configuration is not available as you showed

entry.title: Re: Technical Guide to SAP DMO (Database Migration Option)
entry.content:
Hello @Nikhat9417,


Thank you so much for highlighting important topics for DMO!
Some of the points have changed within the last Software Update Manager SP releases. Please update the blog accordingly at your earliest convenience. I have added the sources for my statements respectively.

1️⃣  Regarding SAP Managed Tags

Database Migration Option (DMO) of Software Update Manager does not support target SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, but is your tool of choice for targeting SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition.

2️⃣ Homogenous migration

Homogenous database migration from SAP HANA to SAP HANA is supported.
DMO Guide at help.sap.com: Planning - Homogeneous DMO 

3️⃣ DMO without system update

DMO can be utilized without any software package update.

DMO Guide at help.sap.com: Planning - Performing DMO Without System Update 

4️⃣ DMO in the scenario DMOVE2S4
DMOVE2S4 means Database Migration Option with move to SAP S/4HANA on Hyperscaler. DMOVE2S4 supports DMO with datacenter switch (as long as the target is SAP S/4HANA). The comment on network requirements still holds true, SAP offers recommendation.
DMO Guide at help.sap.com: Planning - DMO Move to SAP S/4HANA (on Hyperscaler) 

Thank you very much for your attention to this matter!

Best regards,

Mirja Kempin

Software Update Manager Product Management

entry.title: Re: Not able to make the New column to show in front scre...
entry.content: I am running the ( Fiori launch pad ). Is there anyway i can how they designed this app. If you see my screenshot you will know that it is "Analytica Query" CDS and they used some annotations as well, so my understanding is everything is designed from CDS view.

entry.title: Getting Digital Certificate to Configure Communication Settings for Argentina
entry.content:
Note: The steps and processes described here are accurate as of the time of writing, but it's essential to stay updated with any changes on the Argentinian tax authority portal that may affect this procedure. 

Hello! 

In this blog post, we will guide you through configuring the communication settings in the Manage Communication Settings - External Parties app in SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, cloud edition.  

To establish a connection between your business system and the Argentinian tax authority, you need to obtain a digital certificate from the tax authority portal and upload it to the app. You get the digital certificate ready for use before configuring communication settings in the cloud edition. 

Prerequisites 

You have performed the necessary steps to exchange electronic invoices for Argentina using SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, cloud edition. For more information, see Integrating e-Invoices for Argentina, Poland, Romania, Serbia, or Slovakia with SAP S/4HANA Cloud. 

Step 1: Getting the Digital Certificate from the Tax Authority 

You obtain a digital certificate in the Argentinian tax authority portal. For more information, see Manual del Usuario del WSASS and WSAA Manual Del Desarrollador (Chapter 5). 

Step 2: Create Communication Settings 

You create a communication setting using your individual taxpayer identification number (CUIT). See WSASS: Cómo adherirse al servicio for more information. 

Note: Before performing this step, you must first activate the E-Invoices (AR) process in the Activate Processes app. 

Step 3: Add an Authentication Setting  

For the communication type created in step 2, add an authentication setting as follows: 

  1. Select the Key Pair X.509 type. 
  1. Upload the certificate you generated from the Argentinian tax authority portal. 
  1. Enter the password you received along with the certificate.  

Note: SAP supports soft certificates only, roaming certificates are not supported. The digital certificate extensions supported are PFX and P12.

More Information 

Suppose that your company has several company codes representing headquarters and subsidiary units. In this case, you can choose to use only one digital certificate, which is registered with the CUIT of headquarters or a leading subsidiary.  

If you use different SAP systems at the same time, such as SAP ERP and SAP S/4HANA, you can still use the same digital certificate. 

Also remember that a digital certificate has an expiration date. You must renew your certificate when it is about to expire, otherwise, you'll encounter the following errors: 

  • Certificate is not valid according to the chain of trust validation or has been issued by an untrusted certificate authority. 
  • Signing time is not within validity period. 

We hope that you find this information useful. Feel free to leave a comment on this blog or follow SAP Document and Reporting Compliance | SAP Community.

entry.title: Re: Not able to make the New column to show in front scre...

entry.title: Using OAuth Info to call sso-apis in SAP C4C
entry.content:
Hi C4C Team,
it looks like that i have in the data port binding $system/oauthInfo of a html mashup a certificate.
Can i use this to call /sap/c4c/odata-sso/v1/c4codataapi/ api's?
It includes hostname, user, base64_cert and the signature.
How can i use this to call the odata-sso or at least to get a token for this api's?

Thanks.
Regards

entry.title: Do you know the CIAM for B2B data model and how this data model facilitates seamless interactions?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our From Onboarding to Governance: Mastering SAP Customer Data Cloud for B2B learning journey.

Overview
By the end of this course, you will have learned how to use the CIAM’s B2B Organization Management feature to manage organizations, delegate administration tasks, and configure policy-based access control. After activating B2B Organization Management in the CIAM, you will use it to manage member attributes, configure organization approval workflows, manage member profiles, and control what they can do in the UI. You will also know how to onboard organizations using the registration request Web UI, delegate organization administration, and integrate SAP Content Data Cloud’s B2B capabilities with an external website.


Learning objectives
  • Describe the foundations and purpose of the B2B module available in the Customer Identity and Access Management (CIAM) of SAP Customer Data Cloud.
  • Identify key configuration workspaces in the console.
  • Adapt the organization and member's schema to your company’s structure.
  • Allow organization self-registration with an Organization Approval Workflow.
  • Describe the onboarding process for a new organization.
  • Manage member data and use the console to invite members and assign roles.
  • Help SAP Customer Data Cloud talk to an External ID Provider.
  • Configure policy building blocks and asset types.
  • Create a tailored access policy based on organization types, personas, and required access restrictions.
  • Describe use cases for Organizational Policies and automated assignment.
  • Verify credentials from an external website.
  • Embed organization registration screen using SDK.

Prerequisites

  • Exploring SAP Customer Data Cloud Essentials

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: SAP ABAP help for my Structure on se11
entry.content:
Hi Everybody

I have a rapor project on Flight data for rezevertion .

I am using the structure named ZRESERVATION_DATA that I created from se11 when pulling data from the database. in this structure, the typing method of the price component is typte to ref component type S_price. i am trying to pull data using this structure and I get the following error
database field PRICE or the result type of the
aggregate function PRICE and the component
‘PRICE’ of “IT_RESULT” are not compatible.
on the structure side, I can't write something in the reference table and reference field section because I can't switch to change mode
can you help please I am stuck and I am new to this field . What shoıld ı do

please help
below is a screenshot of the problem I am having.

entry.title: Re: How to move Apps generated by Low Code / No Code LCNC Fiori App Manage KPI and Reports
entry.content:
Hi @TrusPatel , 

We need to specify a valid variant (Ex: SAP_ALL) in SCC1N when we do client copy for workbench TR. Kindly refer below SAP notes. 

3515098 - Got "No Descriptor was found for UI5 component customer.ssb.report.NNNNNNNNNNNNN" - SAP for Me

24853 - CC-INFO: Client Copy, Functionality - SAP for Me

Thanks & Regards,

Manirajan Varatharajan

entry.title: Basic Overview on SAP S/4 Hana Cloud Private Edition on Azure
entry.content:
Hi 

Nowadays SAP S/4 Hana Cloud Private Edition is one the deployment option. It is being most demanding. Here I am going to share an Overview on SAP S/4 Hana Cloud Private Edition on Azure. It will be help to keep conceptual knowledge for SAP S/4 Hana Cloud Private Edition on Azure.

Introduction to SAP on Azure

SAP applications form the basis of many enterprise operations, including those of multinational companies. The enterprise resource planning (ERP) applications that SAP provides are highly complex and capable of providing the scalability and analytics that are necessary for many organizations. As organizations move to the cloud it is key that they can take these applications with them which is why Microsoft has partnered with SAP on Azure.

Usage of SAP on Azure

Combining your SAP and Azure operations can provide several benefits that are difficult to obtain with SAP or Azure alone. These include greater flexibility of operations, scalability, and integration of solutions.

Azure Is Hybrid- Azure offers support for hybrid operations beyond connectivity and infrastructure. It enables you to consistently perform operations regardless of platform, including identity management, application development, and security. Native and third-party integrations support these capabilities.

Azure Can Use Bare Metal for HANA-You can deploy HANA to VMs or bare metal servers in Azure. This enables you to ensure that resources are maintained in isolation with dedicated hardware. These servers come built-in with infrastructure for storage, compute, and networking. Additionally, bare metal servers are certified for HANA Tailored Data Center Integration.

Easy Integration of SAP and Microsoft Products-A long term partnership between Microsoft and SAP provides significant support for integrated solutions. For example, both Power BI and Office 365 support the use of SAP HANA. Additionally, both vendors use open standards and interfaces for data exchange, including OData. This enables you to integrate products smoothly with no need for data transformation.

Almost 100% Availability-Azure enables you to spread operations and data redundancies across AZs. Data is automatically replicated for durability and availability. You can also create additional backups or select geo-redundant storage for disaster recovery and failover protection.

Introduction to SAP S/4 Han a Cloud Private Edition and its features

SAP S/4 HANA  Cloud Private Edition is a tailored-to-fit cloud ERP that adapts to your organization's unique transformation. SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition safeguards your existing investment in SAP ERP while benefiting from the latest capabilities and greater flexibility.

Running on your standard

  • Maximize your differentiation by tailoring business processes to your unique requirements​​
  • Protect your investment and move to the cloud at your pace

Modernizing your business

  • Achieve bottom-line growth with proven business processes for your industry
  • Deliver green-line growth by building sustainability directly into your business

Keeping control

  • Manage the speed of change by rolling out innovations on your timeline
  • Choose the cloud infrastructure based on your landscape and preferences

SAP S/4 Hana Cloud Private Edition on Azure

The Microsoft Cloud helps you unleash the power of your SAP applications and data. Whether you migrate to SAP S/4HANA on Azure, leverage RISE with SAP for a fully managed service, or add intelligence with Azure data and AI services, Microsoft provides a reliable, secure and comprehensive cloud platform to transform your SAP estate.

SAP solutions on Azure

Run SAP solutions across development, testing, and production scenarios in Azure. SAP on Azure solutions help you optimize your enterprise resource planning (ERP) in the cloud using the security features, reliability, and scalable SAP-certified infrastructure of Azure. This intelligent ERP suite is designed specifically for in-memory computing. Whether you want to run SAP S/4HANA in a new implementation or migrate from SAP Business Suite to SAP S/4HANA, Azure has you covered.

SAP S/4HANA on Azure benefits:

  • Seamless connectivity for end users who need to access SAP Fiori-based applications when using Azure ExpressRoute.
  • A 99.99 percent SLA for your critical ERP instances by running all product instances of SAP S/4HANA in a high-availability pair by running in two Azure Availability Zones.
  • Backup for SAP S/4HANA and SAP BW/4 HANA in seconds, with a low recovery-time objective—even for multi-terabyte databases.

Certification that SAP S/4HANA runs on SUSE Linux Enterprise and Red Hat Enterprise Linux servers. Plus, SAP HANA on Azure Virtual Machines  and SAP HANA on Azure large-instance machines are certified to run SAP S/4HANA. Microsoft Azure is one of the cloud infrastructure options for the RISE with SAP offering. On Azure, RISE with SAP leverages Microsoft’s global network infrastructure to provide connectivity to SAP applications in a secure and reliable way.

SAP S/4HANA on Azure offers:

• SAP on Azure VM workloads
• Azure Center for SAP solutions
• SAP on Azure deployment automation framework
• Azure Monitor for SAP solutions

There are multiple Microsoft Azure offerings for running and managing your SAP systems. These offerings range from traditional Azure virtual machine (VM) offerings to top-level Azure services, to tools that integrate with other Azure services or external products.

SAP on Azure VM workloads

You can run SAP workloads on the Azure platform using different Azure Virtual Machines (Azure VMs) offerings. Azure is certified for multiple SAP products, including SAP HANA and SAP NetWeaver products.

SAP Integration with Microsoft Services-In addition to the capabilities to run SAP IaaS and SaaS workloads on Azure, Microsoft offers various capabilities, scenarios, best-practice guides, and tutorials to integrate SAP workloads running anywhere with other Microsoft products and services. Among them are popular services such as Microsoft Entra ID, Exchange Online, Power Platform and Power BI, Azure Integration Services, Excel, SAP Business Technology Platform, SAP Analytics Cloud, SAP Data Warehouse Cloud, and SAP Success Factors to name a few.

SAP HANA on Azure (Large Instances)-SAP HANA on Azure (Large Instances) is a solution that provides VMs for deploying and running SAP HANA.

Azure Center for SAP solutions

Azure Center for SAP solutions is a service that makes SAP a top-level workload in Azure. This end-to-end solution allows you to create and run SAP systems as a unified workload on Azure. You can use this service through the Azure portal, a REST API, and the Azure CLI.

SAP on Azure deployment automation framework

The SAP on Azure deployment automation framework is an open-source orchestration tool for deploying, installing, and maintaining SAP environments.

Azure Monitor for SAP solutions

Azure Monitor for SAP solutions is an Azure-native monitoring product for SAP landscapes that run on Azure, which uses specific parts of the Azure Monitor infrastructure.

Conclusion - It is secured and SAP Private Link serves as a great 'Private' connectivity option for certain use-cases enabling access to private service endpoints and avoids public endpoints, thereby resulting in transfer of data over private networks.

Reference-  www.SAP.com,

https://learn.microsoft.com/en-in/azure/sap/workloads/hana-vm-operations

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/quot-sap-private-link-and-azure-private-link-quot-in-the-context-of-sap/ba-p/13719685

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/rise-with-sap-s-4hana-cloud-private-edition-secure-cloud-connectivity/ba-p/13558064

entry.title: Re: How to Edit Multiple Components Simultaneously in SAP Build Apps’ Logic Canvas?
entry.content:
Hi @Ricardo2, it is just before the Sabbath so I can;t take a big look at this now -- I will tomorrow night.

1) Usually if you wanted to turn on and off components, you would use a page variable and bind it to the Visible property of the component, or if you want to control different components separately, create several variables. Is that viable in your case?

2) You said you could not create more than 1 input property. You mean for the Hide/Show Component flow function, or did you mean something else?

entry.title: Re: Error with context.html file
entry.content: I have never seen this particular error, but I use straight SAP GUI. Did you delete the GR_ folder where the context.html lived, and create a new folder? In that case, SAP GUI/NWBC help menu is still pointing to the old GR_ folder which is now missing. Otherwise, I agree with Shane, it seems like the folder (and its context.html) is not Published in SEN.

entry.title: Re: API Real Estate Contracts for Public Cloud
entry.content: Hi Henrike, thanks for your information. In the past I already raised an incident for this but it was not picked up any further (https://me.sap.com/case/002075129500009519452024/overview). We now created a very extensive workaround which is not improving the process. If you want I can create a new incident but I am not sure if this will help. Best regards, Jeroen

entry.title: Re: ADD CUSTOM FIELDS TO ACCOUNT ASSIGNMENT IN MIGO

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA Cloudification Guide for Developer: Navigating to Released APIs from Classic Objects
entry.content:
Your posts about development in Cloud are really good man.

Thanks!

entry.title: One Tool to Track Them All
entry.content:
We launched our process-tracking tool, Process Observer, over a decade ago. Since then, a lot has changed. Now, our goal is Cloud First, and we want our customers to RAISE to the cloud and GROW in the cloud.

SAP acquired and integrated Signavio a while ago and our biggest question was - what is the future of Prcess Observer in the cloud and how does it play together with SAP Signavio Process Intelligence? The answer —A

new kid on the block, "BUSINESS EVENT LOGGING (BEL)."

BEL uses a much leaner and more performant approach compared to Process Observer. It also requires less configuration on your part while still giving you the freedom to enhance and integrate your processes. At the same time, it allows you to easily integrate with SAP Signavio Process Intelligence.

 

 Fig. 1: Event Log Viewer App in Business Event Logging

 

Overview and Benefits

So, what is Business Event Logging?

  •  It collects the event data locally and you can use integration to extract the data into SAP Signavio Process Intelligence.
  • It is based on Business Events, but also supports other sources like Change Documents, but also supports other sources like Change Documents.
  • It provides field change information.
  • It is available now in SAP S/4HANA CE, SAP S/4HANA OP/PC and SAP ABAP Platform Cloud.

How can BEL be useful for you?

  • You can activate logging of events just by selecting the relevant Object Types. You can create process views (“cases”) in SAP Signavio Process Intelligence and analyze your processes there.
  • You can use the data viewer apps to review logged data in multiple aspects.
  • You can manage the data retention in the business event log with SAP ILM.
  • You can extend processes or log your own processes by creating your own Business Events.

 

The Foundation

Business events are object-centric events created in the RAP framework. They are assigned with an event binding and are C2-released by SAP. You can find these events documented in the SAP Business Accelerator Hub, Follow the path: Explore / <your product> / Events.  

 

Fig. 2: Business Events in the BEL Accelerator Hub

The RAP framework is an extensible framework: you can create your own objects, create events with binding, extend SAP delivered objects with your events, or just extend an SAP-delivered event.

Business events can also contain change information. For more information, you can explore event definitions in the SAP Business Accelerator Hub. This change information is now visible in the BEL log.

If you require additional standard events delivered by SAP, or change information, you can raise a request via the Customer Influence Portal. .

Beyond these Business Events, there are internal events such as RAP events, SAP-delivered C1- events, and Change Documents for other BEL data sources. We plan to support them in the future and will keep you updated.

 

Release support

You might be wondering when you could start using this. The great news is that if you’re in the cloud you can start right away!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAP BTP, ABAP Environment:

For the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 or later and for SAP BTP, ABAP Environment 2411 or later, we support:

  • Logging of all released business events for all object types as listed in the SAP Accelerator Hub for the product.
  • Logging of customer events. For more information, see the instructions in the product documentation.

You can find the detailed documentation for Business Event Logging for these products here:

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (latest): User documentation  

SAP BTP, ABAP Environment (latest): User documentation  

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition:

The support in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition depends on the release.

Functionalities provided with PC/OP 2021 FPS2: 

  • Only logging of Order-to-Cash related events provided by SAP (based on Business Event Handling). ).
  • Customer extensibility is not supported by Business Event Handling.

Functionalities provided with PC/OP 2022 FPS1: 

  • Only logging of Order-to-Cash related events provided by SAP (based on RAP)  
  • Customer events are supported with FPS 2 of OP 2022

Functionalities provided with PC/OP 2023 FPS2: 

  • Logging of all Business Events provided by SAP is supported (as documented in the SAP Business Accelerator Hub).

Functionalities provided with S/4HANA Private Cloud / On Premise 2023 (latest):

  • You can view the list of functionalities in the User documentation..

We will cover the integration of the component and the customer extensibility in separate articles.

entry.title: Re: SAP ABAP help for my Structure on se11
entry.content: In the DDIC, it's typed "TYPE REF TO S_PRICE", you have to use "TYPE S_PRICE".

entry.title: Fiori app Mass change of sales orders returns error 'Job failed due to failure in one ore more child
entry.content:
Hello, 

did anyone encounter the error message 'Job failed due to failure in one ore more child tasks. Please try later' when executing an update (eg on requested delivery date)  in the fiori app Mass change of sales orders? 

This is happening when a relatively large number of sales orders/ schedule lines need to be updated (sales orders > 2600 and schedule lines >39000)

In the Job it is visible that several sales documents did not update because of this error

However several other sales documents got updated

From a functional point of view the sales orders for which the error appears could be updated. So it seems really an issue with the fiori app/ job processing.

 

Thanks for any hints!

Ilse

entry.title: Re: ADD CUSTOM FIELDS TO ACCOUNT ASSIGNMENT IN MIGO
entry.content:
Hello @waelrjeb98

The fields can be added with coding block enhancement - see the note 2143232 - How To add a customer field to coding block without modification

Also consider the note 2453614 - FAQ: Universal Journal Extensibility if you are on S/4HANA.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: ADD CUSTOM FIELDS TO ACCOUNT ASSIGNMENT IN MIGO
entry.content: How to transfer a custom field in MIGO to and from MSEG table, I don't know. Did you check these many answers and solutions: https://www.google.com/search?q=MIGO+custom+field+MSEG+site%3Asap.com

entry.title: Re: Object SFPF(Adobe Form) is not allowed in ABAP Cloud...
entry.content:
Hi subhendu901,

You can use SAP Forms service by Adobe. There is a learning journey on SAP Learning that describes this in detail: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/getting-started-with-sap-forms-service-by-adobe

BR,
Alex

entry.title: Re: Invoice RPA Bot - one mail address multiple company c...
entry.content:
Hi Stephan,

The reason behind this is that the API that uploads the invoice to CIM has the company code as a mandatory field, similar to the manual uploads.

So you need to find a way to determine the company code before you upload the invoices.

The requirement is quite common and I also have customers asking for this (and being surprised it's not there) so maybe this is something to put in a customer influence ticket for.

best regards,
Jeroen

entry.title: Re: Sales Cloud V2 Questions - Integration, Embedded SAC, Sales Contract
entry.content: Hi Olivier, currently the contract object is not supported in V2. I don't know if it will come in the future. It's not on the public roadmap details. Simon

entry.title: Re: Serial Number for Current Stock
entry.content:
Hi Dinesh,

Please have a look at note https://me.sap.com/notes/612132 "FAQ: Stock consistency between serial numbers and MM-IM".

Without stock check set to error, you can post a GR for e. g. 10 PC, but only add 2 serial numbers. So there can't be a hidden table that has consistent inventory and serial number management stock. If you require this consistency, please follow the answer to the last question in the note.

BR,
Alex

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI - Issue sending image/pdf as form-data using HTTP adapter
entry.content: Have you read the following community post and response? https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sap-cpi-forwarding-raw-image-data-through-integration-flow/qaq-p/11936736/comment-id/4485580#M4485580

entry.title: Re: Automatic HU WT create within storage control
entry.content:
First thank you for helping.

Ok, I understand your point.  I thought I can build the sequence as i want. So then i try the right order of steps and come back with the result. I hope it'll help.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere: BW Series – Getting Started (Part 2)
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing Sandy. Looking forward part III of this blog series.
Regards Frank

entry.title: Synchronization of GL accounts to CIM seems incomplete
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

After setting up the master data synchronization between SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management  we see that the GL-accounts are not synced completely. That means that the number of GL-accounts in S/4 Cloud (company code view) had more accounts then are ever synced to CIM. The number of missing accounts is different on every environment and we also don't see any logic in which accounts are synced and which aren't

As far as I know, from documentation there should be no filtering on the accounts, which in my opinion should result in all accounts from S/4 cloud to be available in CIM. We see this behavior on customer systems but also on our TDD environment. 

Does anyone have this similar problem and do you have pointers to solve this problem?

best regards,

Jeroen

entry.title: Do you know how to implement, maintain, and enhance your SAP Service and Asset Manager?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Implementing SAP Service and Asset Manager learning journey.

Overview
This Learning Journey provides an in-depth understanding of SAP Service and Asset Manager.
The SAP Service and Asset Manager mobile app provides access to all services and information that maintenance and field technicians need to efficiently and safely do their job, no matter where they are, using smartphones or tablets - even when they're offline.

Learning objectives
After completing this intermediate level learning journey, Implementation Consultants will obtain product knowledge and they will be able to understand the application architecture.
Also they will be prepared to install, setup OOB Service and Asset Manager and connect from client end-to end.
In addition they will learn how to setup backend Standard Configuration, Metadata Deployment and Basic and Advanced Extensions.
They will understand and know about how to utilize the support options available as well.

Prerequisites

  • Discovering Business Processes in SAP Intelligent Asset Management

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Leading Ledger Selection for Parallel Accounting in S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear @Shakeel_Ahmed 

It is a very comprehensive article and I think this blog must be highlighted to everyone.

BTW: Could you help provide the advice for the situation that we would like to change our mind?

1. If we selected 1GA (Ledger 2L) already, but we would like to maintain only 1 Ledger (0L) for each company in our system. Can we still do that? Or we need to deactivate 1GA, which I believe, we cannot.

2. If we started and go-live in our project without 1GA, i.e. we have only 1 ledger for each company. Later, we have acquired a new company where different account principles needed or fiscal year variants needed. Can we still activate 1GA to support this new company?

To me, it seems that we should activate 1GA even without current requirements (to be safe than sorry). Please correct me if i am wrong.

Best Regards

entry.title: FM ENQUEUE_READ for object EBAN
entry.content:
Hello everybody,

We want to check a certain purchase requisition with function module ENQUEUE_READ.
In transaction SM12 the argument is mandt + requ.nr + #####

Question: How do we have to fill parameter GARG to get a result?
Input without #### doesn't work. Input with ##### doesn't work either.
mandt + requ.nr + * works, but only when testing the FM, but not in a report.

Best Regards,
Andreas

entry.title: Re: Migrate data from ECC to V2
entry.content:
Hi @VigneshRamakrishnan ,

The best practice is to use the replication mechanism: Integration with SAP ERP | SAP Help Portal

I don't think replication of Sales Orders is supported in V2. You should be able to have a view on those from V2.

KR,

Simon

entry.title: IDoc Posting test error- HRMD_A01
entry.content: While testing the IDoc inbound processing for HRMD_A01 using WE19, we see the error message "Object is locked Plan ver. , obj ty. , obj ID" no other transactions or sessions were open during the testing, need help identifying why this error is occurring.

entry.title: Re: SAP User Enablement
entry.content: no tutorials available for SAP ECC.

entry.title: Re: SAP ABAP help for my Structure on se11
entry.content: OMG it worked, I knew it would be something so simple. thank you for your reply

entry.title: Display report thumbnail on launchpad 4.3
entry.content:
Hi,

In SAP BO BI 4.3, I need to display additional information in the Fiori Launchpad for Web Intelligence (Webi). This information is already available in a developed Webi report. Is it possible to display this content directly in the Launchpad, either as a widget, a tile, or a thumbnail?

Thanks in advance for your help!

Best regards,

entry.title: 从0开始的SAP世界 Day1
entry.content:
1.ERP是什么？

全称：Enterprise Resource Planning。

中文：企业资源规划

解释：整合企业的各个部门（财务、销售、生产、库存等），让企业高效运转。可以理解成企业的大脑。

核心功能：财务管理，库存管理，销售与客户记录，生产管理，采购管理等。

代表性的ERP系统：SAP、Saleforce、Oracle、Microsoft Dynamics 365、Workday

SAP：德语“Systeme, Anwendungen und Produkte”，意思是“系统、应用与产品”。自 1972 年创立以来，SAP 一直是全球企业管理软件领域的领导者。

2.SAP的各个模块

entry.title: Document Information Extraction Free Tier Now Includes Premium Edition Capabilities
entry.content:
We are thrilled to announce an exciting upgrade to the Free Tier service plan for Document Information Extraction! As of now, the Free Tier option on SAP BTP offers the advanced capabilities of the Premium Edition plan. This includes access to cutting-edge Generative AI features driven by the latest advancements in the space of Large Language Models (LLMs).

Enhanced Capabilities Now Available

The integration of the Premium Edition capabilities into the Free Tier plan means that you can now leverage all the powerful features such as:

- Auto Extraction without model training: Automatically extract business-relevant entities from documents without the need for extensive model training.

- Instant Learning Based on User Corrections: The platform now learns and improves in real-time based on user inputs and corrections.

- Embedded Document Classification: Classify documents seamlessly with embedded classification capabilities.

These features enable businesses to automate and accelerate document processing, improving efficiency and accuracy without additional costs.

Getting Started with the Enhanced Free Tier

To start using the upgraded Free Tier service plan for Document Information Extraction, follow these steps:

  1. Register and create an account in SAP BTP: This account will grant you access to the Document Information Extraction service with the Premium Edition capabilities.
  2. Explore the Free Tier Quota: The free tier offers a quota of 50 uploaded document pages per tenant within a rolling period of 30 days. Make the most of this allocation to test and build your scenarios.

Tutorials to Get Enabled

We have prepared tutorials to help you set up and utilize the Free Tier plan of the Document Information Extraction service:

- Get an Account on SAP BTP to Try Out Free Tier Service Plans: Step-by-step instructions to register and create your SAP BTP account.

- Use Free Tier to Set Up Account for Document Information Extraction and Go to Application: A guide to setting up the Document Information Extraction service and accessing the application.

These resources will ensure a smooth transition from testing to productive usage, empowering you to fully explore the capabilities of the Premium Edition within the Free Tier plan.

Conclusion

This upgrade is a testament to our commitment to providing high-value tools and services accessible to all businesses. By integrating Generative AI capabilities into the Free Tier plan, we aim to democratize access to advanced document processing technologies, enabling you to harness the full potential of SAP AI Services.

entry.title: Re: Error with context.html file
entry.content: I THINK I know what happened. We were having some issues with the Help content not appearing for a particular app. I thought deleting and regenerating the context file would work, but doing that also created a new published link...The URL entered into SM30 was the one from the first context.html file, hence the 404 error. BartRhoten, I think this is what you are saying with your reply.

entry.title: Structure list for equipment in PM Order with several equipments
entry.content:
Hello,

In my maintenance order I have several operations that each have a different equipment. When I want to call up the structure list (via the button 'List') in the components tab, it always shows the structure list of the equipment in the header instead of the equipment in the specific operation. Is there a way to get the structure list of the equipment in the operation?

entry.title: This is regarding ALABAMA overtime tax exempt new regulation.
entry.content:
Hello Experts, This is regarding ALABAMA overtime tax exempt new regulation.

/PPE was created and generated in RT table. I have mapped the WT /PPE to Box 14 but still no showing up in W2.

Please advise.

entry.title: Re: Privileged Access Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud: A Comprehensive Guide
entry.content:
Hello Subbu,

Many thanks for the explanation. After Creation of the PAM User ID and assigning the BR roles to the users via IAG PAM request. 

In the backend S4 On premise user master record is not getting generated and its in Red Color, I am running a Repo Sync  from IAG, but that is not helping, do we also need to run the PFUD jobs?

Please let me know your thoughts. 

Regards

Sudheer Kumar
